recommendations.title: Lovely Molly
recommendations.overview: A supernatural presence menaces a newlywed couple after they move into the wife's long-abandoned childhood home.

recommendations.title: The Blair Witch Project
recommendations.overview: In October of 1994 three student filmmakers disappeared in the woods near Burkittsville, Maryland, while shooting a documentary. A year later their footage was found.

recommendations.title: Altered
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years ago, five men were abducted by aliens. Only four returned. Now, these same four men have managed to capture one of the creatures who killed their friend and ruined their lives.

recommendations.title: Curse of the Blair Witch
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary exploring the life of the Blair Witch and the three missing student filmmakers.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A man, crippled in an accident, returns to the woods after rehabilitation, certain that he'll not see Bigfoot again.

recommendations.title: The Cabin in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Five friends set out for a weekend at a remote cabin in the woods, expecting nothing more than fun and relaxation. As night falls, they discover that something far more unsettling is at work and that nothing about their getaway is what it seems.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2
recommendations.overview: Inside a darkened house looms a column of TVs littered with VHS tapes, a pagan shrine to forgotten analog gods. The screens crackle and pop endlessly with monochrome vistas of static white noise permeating the brain and fogging concentration. But you
recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett

recommendations.title: Eden Lake
recommendations.overview: When a young couple goes to a remote wooded lake for a romantic getaway, their quiet weekend is shattered by an aggressive group of local kids. Rowdiness quickly turns to rage as the teens terrorize the couple in unimaginable ways, and a weekend outi

recommendations.title: A Girl Walks Home Alone at Night
recommendations.overview: In the Iranian ghost-town Bad City, a place that reeks of death and loneliness, the townspeople are unaware they are being stalked by a lonesome vampire.

recommendations.title: Popcorn
recommendations.overview: While holding a horror film festival, a group of film students find themselves stalked by a madman who may have a sinister connection to a cult leader.
